crons.name: agent-work-loop-am
crons.prompt: Run the Agent Work Loop (AM). Read orchestration/workflows/agent-work-loop/SKILL.md and follow it. Send Joe a Telegram summary: bash ../../core/bus/send-telegram.sh 1242084718 "<summary>" — if board is clear, skip the message.

crons.name: agent-work-loop-pm
crons.prompt: Run the Agent Work Loop (PM). Read orchestration/workflows/agent-work-loop/SKILL.md and follow it. Send Joe a Telegram summary: bash ../../core/bus/send-telegram.sh 1242084718 "<summary>" — if board is clear, skip the message.

crons.name: beeper-monitor
crons.prompt: Run Beeper Monitor. Read comms/workflows/beeper-monitor/SKILL.md and follow it. Send findings to Joe via Telegram: bash ../../core/bus/send-telegram.sh 1242084718 "<findings>" — if nothing urgent, skip the message.

crons.name: inbox-check
crons.prompt: Check agent inbox for new messages. Run: bash ../../core/bus/check-inbox.sh — if there are new messages, process them and respond. If empty, do nothing.
